controls.h

1
18#ifndef MEDIA_C_CONTROLS_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_CONTROLS_H_
20
21#include <stddef.h>
22#include <stdint.h>
23
24#include "control.h"
25#include "list.h"
26
27#ifdef __cplusplus
28extern "C" {
29#endif
30
40typedef list_t controls_t;
41
47static inline controls_t* controls_new(size_t size) { return list_new(size, sizeof(control_t)); }
48
54static inline void controls_free(controls_t* controls, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
55 if (controls != NULL) {
56 list_free(controls, free_func);
57 }
58}
59
66static inline bool controls_add(controls_t* controls, control_t* control) { return list_add(controls, control); }
67
74static inline control_t* controls_get(const controls_t* controls, size_t index) {
75 return (control_t*)list_get(controls, index);
76}
77
83static inline size_t controls_size(const controls_t* controls) { return controls->size; }
84
90static inline size_t controls_capacity(const controls_t* controls) { return controls->capacity; }
91
97static inline bool controls_empty(const controls_t* controls) { return controls->size == 0U; }
98
105static inline control_t* controls_find(const controls_t* controls, const char* name) {
106 control_t* result = NULL;
107 for (size_t i = 0; i < controls->size; i++) {
108 control_t* control = controls_get(controls, i);
109 if (strcmp(control->name, name) == 0) {
110 result = control;
111 break;
112 }
113 }
114 return result;
115}
116
122static inline void controls_iterate(const controls_t* controls, void (*callback)(control_t*)) {
123 if ((controls != NULL) && (callback != NULL)) {
124 for (size_t i = 0; i < controls->size; i++) {
125 control_t* control = controls_get(controls, i);
126 callback(control);
127 }
128 }
129}
130
136static inline void controls_inspect(const controls_t* controls, int (*print_func)(const char*, ...)) {
137 (void)print_func("Controls:\n");
138 for (size_t i = 0; i < controls->size; ++i) {
139 const control_t* control = controls_get(controls, i);
140 control_print(control, print_func, "\t");
141 }
142}
143
144#ifdef __cplusplus
145}
146#endif
147
148#endif // MEDIA_C_CONTROLS_H_
control.h
Media control descriptor.
control_print
static void control_print(const control_t *control, int(*print_func)(const char *,...), const char *indent)
Print a control descriptor to an output using the provided print function.
